data.body:
Epic complete: all 8 stories closed, all tests passing, no RED markers remaining.

Summary of delivered features:
1. HARD-GATE preamble in fix-bug SKILL.md (018a-0b5b)
2. hypothesis_tests RESULT schema in SKILL.md + all 10 prompts (78aa-79b2: 5f26-013c, 465c-810b, 11d7-eeac)
3. Step 3.5 Hypothesis Validation Gate (91bf-a66b)
4. Step 5.5 RED-before-fix Gate with mechanical exemption (b094-3cf4)
5. UserPromptSubmit hook for /fix-bug Skill tool directive (bf19-4327, 65ad-b88a)
6. Unit test coverage for all gates (8a52-74f7)
7. CLAUDE.md documentation updates (dce1-ab48)

Total: 7 batches, 8 stories, ~60 tests added.
